sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62756" key="leukoforino/xroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-φορῑνόχροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">white-skin-coloured</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
